news.t: 7 Actively Managed ETFs to Buy for an Edge

overview.description: The First Trust Long/Short Equity ETF (FTLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund takes both long and short position in US-listed equity with US and foreign exposure. The actively managed funds will typically be 90-100% long and 0-50% short. FTLS was launched on Sep 9, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: 7 Actively Managed ETFs to Buy for an Edge
data.text: It has taken some time, but actively managed exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are finally gaining traction with investors.
